author: Sarah Chen
content: Started planning the Clerk migration. Created tickets AUTH-230 through AUTH-245 for the migration checklist.

author: Kai Rivera
content: Set up staging environment for Clerk integration testing. Deployed test instance of auth-service with Clerk SDK.

author: Priya Sharma
content: Working on frontend auth components. Replacing Auth0 Lock widget with Clerk SignIn component.

author: Sarah Chen
content: Completed Clerk webhook integration for user sync. All existing users migrated to Clerk in staging.

author: Kai Rivera
content: PostgreSQL migration planning. Estimated 4-hour maintenance window needed for the cutover.

author: Priya Sharma
content: Frontend performance audit. Found 3 components re-rendering unnecessarily. Added React.memo wrappers.

author: Sarah Chen
content: Reviewed Clerk production pricing. Confirmed free tier covers our MAU. Enterprise features available if needed.

author: Kai Rivera
content: Load testing the new auth flow. Clerk handles 500 concurrent logins without issues. Auth0 was failing at 200.

author: Priya Sharma
content: Deployed frontend optimizations to staging. Page load time improved from 3.2s to 1.8s on mobile.

author: Sarah Chen
content: Final auth migration review. Green light from security team. Production cutover scheduled for March 20.
